day_cal.text: ดอกเบี้ยค้างตั้งเเต่

root.sql:
select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(vr_loan_miss_lon.membership_no) as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( vr_loan_miss_lon.operate_date , 'dd month yyyy') as cut_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( vr_loan_miss_lon.last_calcint_date , 'dd month yyyy') as last_calcint_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( vr_loan_miss_lon.begining_of_contract , 'dd month yyyy') as begining_of_contract_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( vr_loan_miss_lon.last_access_date , 'dd month yyyy') as last_access_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( vr_loan_miss_lon.operate_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as operate_tdate ,(('!day_cal!')::numeric) as day_cal ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!operate_date!' - '!day_cal!' , 'MON YY') as month_cal
,vr_loan_miss_lon.* from vr_loan_miss_lon where 1=1 /*WHERE*/
order by vr_loan_miss_lon.membership_no
